Package org.apache.juneau.commons.logging

Class LogRecordCapture

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.commons.logging.LogRecordCapture
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, LogRecordListener
public class LogRecordCapture extends Object implements LogRecordListener, Closeable
Captures log records for testing purposes.

This class implements LogRecordListener to receive log records and stores them in memory for inspection during tests. It implements Closeable to automatically remove itself from the logger's listeners when closed.

Usage:

// Capture records using try-with-resources try (LogRecordCapture capture = Logger.getLogger(MyClass.class).captureEvents()) { logger.info("Test message"); logger.warning("Warning message"); // Inspect captured records List<LogRecord> records = capture.getRecords(); assertEquals(2, records.size()); // Get formatted messages List<String> messages = capture.getRecords("{level}: {msg}"); assertEquals("INFO: Test message", messages.get(0)); }

Format String:

The format string supports placeholders as documented in LogRecord.formatted(String).

See Also:
  • Logger.captureEvents()
  • LogRecord.formatted(String)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()

      public void onLogRecord(LogRecord rec)
      Called when a log record is logged.

      rec - The log record that was logged.

    • getRecords

      public List<LogRecord> getRecords()
      Returns an unmodifiable list of all captured log records.

      An unmodifiable list of captured LogRecords.

    • getRecords

      public List<String> getRecords(String format)
      Returns captured log records formatted as strings.

      The format string supports placeholders as documented in LogRecord.formatted(String).

      Parameters:
      format - The format string with placeholders.
      Returns:
      A list of formatted record strings.

      Returns true if any records have been captured.
